evidence_excerpt: Video and clinical description note she is "now observed with progressive spasticity, rigidity, dystonia, and cognitive decline." BPAN is described as having a rapidly progressive onset in adolescence, and symptomatic treatments "do not halt neurodegeneration."

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: Previously walking and talking, she is now observed with progressive spasticity, rigidity, dystonia, and cognitive decline; exam documented spastic quadriparesis and intellectual disability.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: Persistent and progressive motor symptoms (spasticity, rigidity, dystonia) and cognitive decline; L-dopa provided some dystonia relief but NBIA/BPAN therapies are noted not to halt neurodegeneration.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: After diagnosis, "Our patient was started on carbidopa/levodopa (L-dopa), which seemed to help with her dystonia."
Video legend: "now observed with progressive spasticity, rigidity, dystonia, and cognitive decline."

notes_on_uncertainty: The record provides limited post-diagnosis follow-up and no precise dates relative to diagnosis; timing of progression and duration of L-dopa benefit are not specified, so event time periods are marked as unknown. Comorbid seizures, optic atrophy, and hearing loss are noted but their timing relative to diagnosis is unclear.
